title: Nicole Emmelhainz
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Nicole Emmelhainz
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
education_entries: Ph D in English, Case Western Reserve University
MA in Creative Writing (Poetry), Ohio University
MA in English, Ball State University
research_interests: Writing / Writing Center Studies, Pedagogy, Collaboration and Discourse Communities, Digital Technologies and New Media, Digital Humanities, Genre Fiction and Feminist Theory
teaching_interests: Writing Center training, Composition, Creative Writing, Professional and Technical Writing, Digital Humanities, Feminist Theory and Writings
publications: Book, Chapter in Scholarly Book-New (2023). Community is the Center: Social Justice Pedagogy and Practice for More Engaged Writing Consultant Training . Utah State University Press.
Book, Chapter in Scholarly Book-New (2021). Learning to Read Again: Introducing Students to Critical Distant Reading and Big Data Analysis . University of Pittsburgh Press.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2020). Tutoring Begins with Breath: Guided Meditation and its Effects on Writing Consultant Training . WLN: A Journal of Writing Center Scholarship.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2016). A Sword-Edge Beauty as Keen as Blades: C.L. Moore and the Gender Dynamics of Sword and Sorcery . Skelos. Volume, 1. Issue, 1. Pages, 118-125.
Book, Chapter in Scholarly Book-New (2015). Strange Collaborations: Weird Tales's Discourse Community as a Site of Collaborative Writing . Rowman and Littlefield. Pages, 51-62.
awards_honors: Stygian Award for Outstanding Achievement for a Website or Periodical, The Robert E. Howard Foundation. (2021)
The Hyrkanian Award for Outstanding Achievement in an Essay, The Robert E. Howard Foundation. (2021)
Provost's Award for Excellence in Teaching Student Writing, Office of the Provost. (2016)

Artistic Accomplishments: Poetry - Online Journal "How to be a farmer". Pidgeonholes.
Poetry - Online Journal "How to gather eggs". Pidgeonholes.
Poetry - Online Journal "Night Dreams and Daymares". Sandpiper: A Journal of Literature and Art.
Poetry - Online Journal "October Harvest". Sandpiper: A Journal of Literature and Art.
Poetry - Online Journal "How Can We Keep Such Comfort Safe". Gravel: A Literary Journal. Gravel: A Literary Journal. Monticello, Arkansas.
Poetry - Online Journal "Mother's Wisdom". Gravel: A Literary Journal. Gravel: A Literary Journal. Monticello, Arkansas.
Poetry - Online Journal "Dares to Wonder There". Foliate Oak. Monticello, Arkansas.
Presentations: Brooke Covington, Nicole Emmelhainz, Graciela Greger, Alexander Nyikos, IWCA National Conference, ""Centered in Community: Reflections on Establishing a Community Writing Center"," VIRTUAL. (2021)
Mary Wright, Nicole Emmelhainz, Conference on College Composition and Communication (CCCC), "Transfer or Be Transferred," Kansas City, MO. (2018)
